message:
feat(tui): centralize focus-aware panel borders and theme palette delegation

Theme layer (tui_theme.rs):
- Add focus_border_color() helper that returns highlighted vs dimmed
  border color based on panel focus state
- Add SELECTION_PREFIX / SELECTION_PREFIX_INACTIVE constants for
  consistent list-item selection indicators
- Optimize lerp_color() with mul_add for fused multiply-add performance

Chrome layer (tui_chrome.rs):
- Remove legacy HC_* high-contrast constants — color logic now lives
  entirely in tui_theme, eliminating duplication
- Consolidate ChromePalette::from_settings to always delegate to the
  theme module instead of inlining color values
- Fix off-by-one in tab separator rendering that caused a trailing
  separator after the last tab
- Update unit tests to reflect the new palette delegation

Screen layer (all 15 tui_screens/*.rs files):
- Thread focus state through render functions so each panel can call
  focus_border_color() for its own border
- Replace hard-coded Color::White / Color::DarkGray borders with
  theme-derived focus-aware colors for visual consistency
- Affected screens: agents, analytics, attachments, contacts,
  dashboard, explorer, inspector, messages, projects, reservations,
  search, system_health, threads, timeline, tool_metrics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
